name: Whole Wheat Sourdough
recipeInstructions:
I used the whole wheat starter and experimented with your whole wheat bread recipe in the DAK today. It turned out great. Basically, I just halved your recipe and added a few things. My DAK is a 3-cup flour model; yours is? If using whole wheat or rye flour, add more flour because it doesn't rise as much. Add vital wheat gluten and lecithin to aid elasticity and help it rise when using whole wheat. This is what I put in the DAK and the order:
1. Turn the light/dark setting to 12 o'clock.
2. Set the menu to Sweet Bread (the auto mode, not manual).
3. At the beeps, add 3/4 cup pecans (if available). Use large pieces as they are cut up during kneading.
4. Experiment with other additions like raisins, oatmeal, or seeds.
Have you tried adding these ingredients? Let me know what you added or subtracted. Thanks for taking the time to post the recipe! P.S. I have some beer starter to give you when we get together, but the whole wheat starter is great.
